packageRequest.ShipNotificationAddressEmail = batchDataRow[\"EmailAddress\"].ToString();              \n            }\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Service Type\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Translates and sets the carrier service type\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"batchDataRow\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"shipRequest\"></param>\n        private void SetServiceType(DataRow batchDataRow, ShipmentRequest shipRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams, bool batchFile, string batchReference)\n        {\n            if (batchFile)\n            {\n                string serviceType = string.Empty;  \n\n                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(serviceType))\n                {\n                    // set from the screen\n                    shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = Tools.TranslateServiceType(serviceType);\n                }\n                else\n                {\n                    // must have been in the file\n                    Service service = new Service\n                    {\n                        Symbol = batchDataRow[\"Service\"].ToString()\n                    };\n\n                    shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = service;\n                }\n            }\n            else\n            {\n                // Must be coming from a DB\n                Service service = new Service\n                {\n                    Symbol = batchDataRow[\"Service\"].ToString()\n                };\n\n                shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = service;\n            }\n\n            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol))\n            {\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"Batch record did not have a Service Type for batch \" + batchReference);\n                throw new Exception(\"ERROR... You did not provide a Carrier Service Type for batch \" + batchReference + \" please try again.\");\n            }\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Billing Terms\n        /// <summary>\n        /// sets the billing terms\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"batchDataRow\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"shipRequest\"></param>\n        private void SetBillingTerms(DataRow batchDataRow, ShipmentRequest shipRequest)\n        {\n            shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Terms = \"SHIPPER\";\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Custom Methods for this class only\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Returns the first part of the email address\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"clientContext\"></param>\n        /// <returns>string user name</returns>\n        private string SplitUserFromEmailAddress(ClientContext clientContext)\n        {\n            string userName = string.Empty;\n            \n            if (clientContext != null)\n            {\n                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(clientContext.User.UserName))\n                {\n                    if (clientContext.User.UserName.Contains('@'))\n                    {\n                        return clientContext.User.UserName.Split('@')[0];\n                    }\n                    else\n                    {\n                        Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Warning, \"Warning In SplitUserFromEmailAddress ClientContext username did not contain an @ and could not be parsed.\");\n                    }\n                }\n                else\n                {\n                    Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"Error In SplitUserFromEmailAddress clientContext user name was null or empty. Could not get the user name.\");\n                }\n            }\n            else\n            {\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"Error In SplitUserFromEmailAddress could not parse email address as the ClientContext was null.\");\n            }\n\n            return userName;\n        }\n        #endregion\n    }\n}\n"},{"file":"DataService.cs","fullContent":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Data;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing System.Text;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing System.Xml.Serialization;\nusing System.IO;\nusing System.Xml.Linq;\nusing System.Data.SqlClient;\nusing PSI.Sox.Interfaces;\nusing Microsoft.VisualBasic.FileIO;\n\nnamespace PSI.Sox\n{\n    public class DataService\n    {\n        public ILogger Logger { get; set; }\n\n        public enum DataSetName\n        {\n            HEADER,\n            COMMODITY,\n            PACKAGES,\n            INSERT\n        }\n        public enum BatchFileType\n        {\n            DELIMITED,\n            FIXWIDTH\n        }\n        public DataService(ILogger logger)\n        {\n            Logger = logger;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Get Data from db\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"connectionString\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"keyNumber\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"dataSetName\"></param>\n        /// <returns>Dataset</returns>\n        public DataSet GetDataByKeyNumber(string connectionString, string keyNumber, DataSetName dataSetName)\n        {\n            DataSet dataset = new DataSet();\n\n            try\n            {\n                using (SqlConnection connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))\n                {\n                    using (SqlCommand sqlCommand = new SqlCommand(GetSQLQuery(dataSetName), connection))\n                    {\n                        sqlCommand.CommandType = CommandType.Text;\n                        sqlCommand.CommandText = GetSQLQuery(dataSetName);\n                        sqlCommand.Parameters.Add(\"@datakey\", SqlDbType.VarChar).Value = keyNumber;\n\n                        using (SqlDataAdapter dataAdapter = new SqlDataAdapter())\n                        {\n                            dataAdapter.SelectCommand = sqlCommand;\n\n                            Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"Attempting to open connection in GetDataByKeyNumber()\");\n                            connection.Open();\n\n                            Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"Opened connection in GetDataByKeyNumber()\");\n\n                            dataAdapter.Fill(dataset);\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n\n                if (dataset.Tables[0].Rows.Count == 0)\n                {\n                    Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"No data was found for \" + keyNumber + \" in GetDataByKeyNumber()\");\n                }\n            }\n            catch (Exception ex)\n            {\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"Error searching for '\" + keyNumber + \"' GetDataByKeyNumber [\" + dataSetName + \"]\" + ex.Message);\n                throw new Exception(\"Error searching for '\" + keyNumber + \"' GetDataByKeyNumber [\" + dataSetName + \"]\" + ex.Message);\n            }\n\n            return dataset;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// SQL \n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"dataSetName\"></param>\n        /// <returns>string</returns>\n        private string GetSQLQuery(DataSetName dataSetName)\n        {\n            StringBuilder query = new StringBuilder();\n\n            switch (dataSetName)\n            {\n                case DataSetName.HEADER:\n\n                    query.Append(\"SELECT * \");\n                    query.Append(\"FROM [DemoCustomerDb].[dbo].[OpenOrderDb] \");\n                    query.Append(\"WHERE order_id = @datakey\");\n\n                    break;\n\n                case DataSetName.COMMODITY:\n\n                    query.Append(\"SELECT * \");\n                    query.Append(\"FROM [DemoCustomerDb].[dbo].[OrderDetailLinesDb] \");\n                    query.Append(\"WHERE order_id = @datakey\");\n\n                    break;\n\n                case DataSetName.PACKAGES:\n\n                    // put SQL to read package(s) data\n\n                    break;\n\n                case DataSetName.INSERT:\n\n                    // put SQL to insert package(s) data\n                    // \"INSERT INTO tbl (ordernum, freightcost, Date) VALUES(@ordernum, @freightcost, @shippedatetime)\";\n                    break;\n\n                default:\n\n                    throw new Exception(\"Invalid DataSetName\");\n            }\n\n            Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Trace, \"SQL select to get consignee info in GetSQLQuery() \" + query.ToString());\n\n            return query.ToString();\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// EXAMPLE INSERT\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"connectionString\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"keyNumber\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"shipmentRequest\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"shipmentResponse\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"dataSetName\"></param>\n        public void InsertShippedData(string connectionString, string keyNumber, ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, ShipmentResponse shipmentResponse, DataSetName dataSetName)\n        {\n            try\n            {\n                using (SqlConnection connection = new SqlConnection(connectionString))\n                {\n                    using (SqlCommand sqlCommand = new SqlCommand(GetSQLQuery(dataSetName), connection))\n                    {\n                        sqlCommand.CommandType = CommandType.Text;\n                        sqlCommand.CommandText = GetSQLQuery(dataSetName);\n\n                        // Pass your values to the parameters EXAMPLE\n                        sqlCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue(\"@ordernum\", shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference);\n                        sqlCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue(\"@freightcost\", shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference);\n                        sqlCommand.Parameters.AddWithValue(\"@shippedatetime\", DateTime.Now);\n\n                        connection.Open();\n                        sqlCommand.ExecuteNonQuery();\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            catch (Exception ex)\n            {\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"Error inserting data for '\" + keyNumber + \"' InsertShippedDate [\" + dataSetName + \"]\" + ex.Message);\n                throw new Exception(\"Error inserting data for '\" + keyNumber + \"' InsertShippedDate [\" + dataSetName + \"]\" + ex.Message);\n            }\n        }\n\n        #region Parse Batch File\n        /// <summary>\n        /// This takes in the stream and parses the batch file\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"fileStream\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"batchFileType\"></param>\n        /// <returns>Datatable with the correct columns</returns>\n        public DataSet ParseBatchFile(Stream fileStream, BatchFileType batchFileType)\n        {\n            try\n            {\n                DataSet dataSet = new DataSet();\n                DataTable dataTable = new DataTable();\n                dataTable.TableName = \"batchfiledata\";\n\n                if (dataTable.Columns.Count == 0)\n                {\n                    List<string> columnsNames = getColumnNames();\n\n                    foreach (var name in columnsNames)\n                    {\n                        dataTable.Columns.Add(name);\n                    }\n                }\n\n                using (TextFieldParser parser = new TextFieldParser(fileStream))\n                {\n                    if (batchFileType == BatchFileType.DELIMITED)\n                    {\n                        parser.Delimiters = new string[] { \",\" };\n                        parser.TextFieldType = Microsoft.VisualBasic.FileIO.FieldType.Delimited;\n                    }\n\n                    if (batchFileType == BatchFileType.FIXWIDTH)\n                    {\n                        parser.TextFieldType = Microsoft.VisualBasic.FileIO.FieldType.FixedWidth;\n                        parser.SetFieldWidths(4, 6, 35, 35, 35, 35, 24, 14, 5, 4, 10, 4, 5, 15, 15, 15, 28, 5, 5, 5);\n                    }\n\n                    bool fileContainsHeader = true;\n\n                    while (!parser.EndOfData)\n                    {\n                        string[] fields = parser.ReadFields();\n\n                        if (fileContainsHeader)\n                        {\n                            fileContainsHeader = false;\n\n                            continue;\n                        }\n\n                        dataTable.Rows.Add(fields);\n                    }\n                }\n\n                if (dataTable.Rows.Count == 0)\n                {\n                    dataTable = null;\n                    Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"No data was found for for File Batching in ParseBatchFile()\");\n                }\n\n                dataSet.Tables.Add(dataTable);\n\n                return dataSet;\n            }\n            catch (Exception ex)\n            {\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"ERROR... Could not create Batch file data in ParseBatchFile()... \" + ex.Message);\n                throw new Exception(\"ERROR... Could not ParseBatchFile to be used for batching...\" + ex.Message);\n            }\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// I am making the TEXT file format the\n        /// same as the database format so that there is only \n        /// 1 set of code\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <returns>List of column names for the data table</returns>\n        private List<string> getColumnNames()\n        {\n            List<string> columnName = new List<string>\n            {\n                // PLEASE NOTE:\n                // The below column names MUST be in order of the text file fields\n                \"PackageSeq\",\n                \"ShipFromReturnCompany\",\n                \"ShipFromReturnContact\",\n                \"ShipFromReturnAddress1\",\n                \"ShipFromReturnAddress2\",\n                \"ShipFromReturnAddress3\",\n                \"ShipFromReturnCity\",\n                \"ShipFromReturnState\",\n                \"ShipFromReturnZipcode\",\n                \"ShipFromReturnCountry\",\n                \"ShipFromReturnPhone\",\n                \"ShipToCompany\",\n                \"ShipToContact\",\n                \"ShipToAddress1\",\n                \"ShipToAddress2\",\n                \"ShipToAddress3\",\n                \"ShipToCity\",\n                \"ShipToState\",\n                \"ShipToZipcode\",\n                \"ShipToCountry\",\n                \"ShipToPhone\",\n                \"FriendlyService\",    // THIS IS NOT MAPPED ON THE IMPORT it's just a place holder\n                \"Service\",\n\n                \"Packaging\",\n                \"PackageWeight\",\n                \"Length\",\n                \"Width\",\n                \"Height\",\n                \"ShipperReference\",       // cost center in the file\n                \"ConsigneeReference\",\n                \"EmailAddress\",\n                \"ReturnLabelNeeded\",      // need to discuss this with steve and add it in the batch code\n                \"ProofRequireSignature\",   // Y or N\n                \"SaturdayDelivery\",           // Y or N\n                \"DocumentsOnly\",             // Y or N\n                \"Description\",\n\n                \"Item1ProductCode\",   // 33\n                \"Item1Description\",\n                \"Item1OriginCountry\",\n                \"Item1Quantity\",\n                \"Item1UnitValue\",\n                \"Item1UnitWeight\",\n\n                \"Item2ProductCode\",\n                \"Item2Description\",\n                \"Item2OriginCountry\",\n                \"Item2Quantity\",\n                \"Item2UnitValue\",\n                \"Item2UnitWeight\",\n\n                \"Item3ProductCode\",\n                \"Item3Description\",\n                \"Item3OriginCountry\",\n                \"Item3Quantity\",\n                \"Item3UnitValue\",\n                \"Item3UnitWeight\",\n\n                \"Item4ProductCode\",\n                \"Item4Description\",\n                \"Item4OriginCountry\",\n                \"Item4Quantity\",\n                \"Item4UnitValue\",\n                \"Item4UnitWeight\",\n\n                \"Item5ProductCode\",\n                \"Item5Description\",\n                \"Item5OriginCountry\",\n                \"Item5Quantity\",\n                \"Item5UnitValue\",\n                \"Item5UnitWeight\"\n            };\n\n            return columnName;\n        }\n        #endregion Parse Batch File\n    }\n}\n"},{"file":"LoadShipment.cs","fullContent":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing System.Text;\nusing System.Data;\nusing PSI.Sox.Interfaces;\n\nnamespace PSI.Sox\n{\n    public class LoadShipment\n    {\n        Tools Tools;\n\n        public ILogger Logger { get; set; }\n\n        public LoadShipment(ILogger logger)\n        {\n            Logger = logger;\n            Tools = new Tools(Logger);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Entry point to create a FULL ShipmentRequest\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"keyNumber\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"Params\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"xmlResponse\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"connectionStrings\"></param>\n        /// <returns>Shipment Request</returns>\n        public ShipmentRequest GetShipmentRequest(string keyNumber,ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings)\n        {\n            Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"In GetShipmentRequest.\");\n\n            string connectionString = Tools.GetStringValueFromBusinessRuleSettings(\"customersdb\", BusinessRuleSettings);\n\n            DataService dataService = new DataService(Logger);\n            \n            DataSet orderData = dataService.GetDataByKeyNumber(connectionString, keyNumber, DataService.DataSetName.HEADER);\n\n            if (orderData == null)\n            {        \n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"No record(s) found for '\" + keyNumber + \"' DataSet[\" + DataService.DataSetName.HEADER + \"]\");\n                throw new Exception(\"No record(s) found for '\" + keyNumber + \"' DataSet[\" + DataService.DataSetName.HEADER + \"]\");\n            }\n\n            DataSet commodities = dataService.GetDataByKeyNumber(connectionString, keyNumber, DataService.DataSetName.COMMODITY);\n\n            if(commodities == null)\n            {\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"No record(s) found for '\" + keyNumber + \"' DataSet[\" + DataService.DataSetName.COMMODITY + \"]\");\n                throw new Exception(\"No record(s) found for '\" + keyNumber + \"' DataSet[\" + DataService.DataSetName.COMMODITY + \"]\");\n            }\n\n            DataSet packagesDataSet = new DataSet();\n\n            //// You can use this for customers that load mulitple packages in the load event.\n            //packagesDataSet = dataService.GetDataByKeyNumber(connectionString, keyNumber, DataService.DataSetName.PACKAGES);\n\n            //if(packagesDataSet == null)\n            //{\n            //    Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info,\"No record(s) found for '\" + keyNumber + \"' DataSet[\" +  DataService.DataSetName.PACKAGES + \"]\");\n            //    throw new Exception(\"No record(s) found for '\" + keyNumber + \"' DataSet[\" + DataService.DataSetName.PACKAGES + \"]\");\n            //}\n\n            // packageIndex can be used for customers that load multiple packages on the load event.\n            int packageIndex = 0;\n\n            if (orderData != null)\n            {\n                shipmentRequest = SetPackageDefaults(orderData, shipmentRequest, keyNumber);\n\n                // This method can be placed in a loop if you need to populate multipiece shipments.  Don't forget\n                // to do a shipmentRequest.pacakges.Add(packageRequest); if you are doing multipiece shipments\n                shipmentRequest = SetPackageData(orderData, packagesDataSet, commodities, shipmentRequest, userParams, keyNumber, packageIndex);\n            }\n            else\n            {\n                shipmentRequest = null;\n            }\n\n            return shipmentRequest;\n        }\n\n        #region Default Attribute\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Set all Default package Attributes\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"orderData\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"shipmentRequest\"></param>\n        private ShipmentRequest SetPackageDefaults(DataSet orderData, ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, string keyNumber)\n        {\n            // --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n            // only set the ShipDate IF there is no ShipDate\n            // otherwise you will override the ShipExec\n            // thin client ShipDate on the user interface\n            //if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate == null)\n            //{\n            //    shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = new Date(DateTime.Now);\n            //}\n\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee = SetConsigneeData(orderData);\n\n            // shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress = SetShipFromData(orderData);\n\n            // shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ImporterOfRecord = SetImporterOfRecord(orderData);\n\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = SetServiceType(orderData);\n\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Terms = SetBillingTerms(orderData, shipmentRequest);\n\n            // shipmentRequest = SetShipmentUserData(shipmentRequest, orderData, keyNumber);\n\n            return shipmentRequest;\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Name Address Methods\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Set consignee data fields\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"orderData\"></param>\n        /// <returns>consignee NameAddress Obj</returns>\n        private NameAddress SetConsigneeData(DataSet orderData)\n        {\n            NameAddress consignee = new NameAddress();\n\n            consignee.Country = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_country_symbol\"].ToString();\n            consignee.Company = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_company\"].ToString();\n            consignee.Contact = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_contact\"].ToString());\n            consignee.Address1 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_address1\"].ToString());\n            consignee.Address2 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_address2\"].ToString());\n            consignee.Address3 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_address3\"].ToString());\n            consignee.City = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_city\"].ToString());\n            consignee.StateProvince = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_state_province\"].ToString());\n            consignee.PostalCode = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_postal_code\"].ToString());\n            consignee.Phone = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_phone\"].ToString());\n            // consignee.Residential = Tools.ConvertToBool(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_residential\"]);\n\n            //if(Tools.IsPoBoxFound(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_po_box_flag\"]))\n            //{\n            //    consignee.PoBox = Tools.ConvertToBool(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_po_box_flag\"]);\n            //}\n\n            return consignee;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Set ship from data fields\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"orderData\"></param>\n        /// <returns>ship from NameAddress Obj</returns>\n        private NameAddress SetShipFromData(DataSet orderData)\n        {\n            NameAddress shipFromData = new NameAddress();\n\n            shipFromData.Country = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_country_symbol\"].ToString();\n            shipFromData.Company = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_company\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Contact = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_contact\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Address1 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_address1\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Address2 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_address2\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Address3 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_address3\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.City = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_city\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.StateProvince = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_state_province\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.PostalCode = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_postal_code\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Phone = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_phone\"].ToString();\n   \n            return shipFromData;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Set third party data fields\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"orderData\"></param>\n        /// <returns>3rd Party data NameAddress Obj</returns>\n        private ShipmentRequest SetThirdPartyData(DataSet orderData, ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest)\n        {\n            NameAddress thirdPartyBillingData = new NameAddress();\n\n            bool thirdPartyFlag = (bool)orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_billing\"];\n\n            if (thirdPartyFlag)\n            {\n                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling = true;\n\n                thirdPartyBillingData.Account = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_account\"].ToString();\n                thirdPartyBillingData.Country = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_country_symbol\"].ToString();\n                thirdPartyBillingData.Company = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_company\"].ToString());\n                thirdPartyBillingData.Address1 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_address1\"].ToString());\n                thirdPartyBillingData.Address2 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_address2\"].ToString());\n                thirdPartyBillingData.Address3 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_address3\"].ToString());\n                thirdPartyBillingData.City = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_city\"].ToString());\n                thirdPartyBillingData.StateProvince = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_state_province\"].ToString());\n                thirdPartyBillingData.PostalCode = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_postal_code\"].ToString());\n                thirdPartyBillingData.Phone = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_phone\"].ToString());\n                \n                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress = thirdPartyBillingData;\n            }\n            \n            return shipmentRequest;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        ///  Set importer of record data feilds\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"orderData\"></param>\n        /// <returns>importer of record NameAddress Obj</returns>\n        private NameAddress SetImporterOfRecord(DataSet orderData)\n        {\n            NameAddress importOfRecord = new NameAddress();\n\n            importOfRecord.Country = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_country_symbol\"].ToString();\n            importOfRecord.Company = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_company\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.Contact = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_contact\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.Address1 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_address1\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.Address2 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_address2\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.Address3 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_address3\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.City = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_city\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.StateProvince = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_state_province\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.PostalCode = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_postal_code\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.Phone = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_phone\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.Account = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"ImporterOfRecordAccount\"].ToString();\n\n            return importOfRecord;\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Package Data Method\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Set all package data\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"orderData\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"shipmentRequest\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"Params\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"keyNumber\"></param>\n        /// <returns></returns>\n        private ShipmentRequest SetPackageData(DataSet orderData, DataSet packagesDataSet,DataSet commodities, ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, SerializableDictionary Params, string keyNumber, int packageIndex)\n        {\n            shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex] = SetPackageReferenceFields(orderData, packagesDataSet, keyNumber, shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex]);\n\n            shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex] = SetPackageEmailNotification(orderData, shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex]);\n\n            shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex] = SetPackageAccessorials(orderData, packagesDataSet, shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex]);\n\n            shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex] = SetPackageUserData(shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex], orderData, packagesDataSet, keyNumber);\n\n            shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex] = SetPackageDimensions(orderData, shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex]);\n\n            if(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country != \"US\")\n            {\n                shipmentRequest = SetCommodityContents(shipmentRequest, orderData, packagesDataSet, commodities, packageIndex);\n\n                //// unrem as needed\n                // shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].ImporterOfRecord = SetImporterOfRecord(orderData);\n            }\n\n            return shipmentRequest;\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Package Accessorials\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Set all Accessorials\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"orderData\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"packageRequest\"></param>\n        private PackageRequest SetPackageAccessorials(DataSet orderData, DataSet packagesDataSet, PackageRequest packageRequest)\n        {\n            //// unrem or add as needed to populate package accessorials\n            packageRequest.Packaging = \"CUSTOM\";\n            //packageRequest.Proof = Tools.ConvertToBool(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"Proof\"].ToString());\n            //packageRequest.SaturdayDelivery = Tools.ConvertToBool(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"SaturdayDelivery\"].ToString());\n            //packageRequest.DeclaredValueAmount = Tools.ConvertToMoney(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"DeclaredValueAmount\"].ToString());\n\n            return packageRequest;\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Commodity Contents\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Set Commodity Contents\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"shipmentRequest\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"packageRequest\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"orderData\"></param>\n        private ShipmentRequest SetCommodityContents(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, DataSet orderData,DataSet packagesDataSet, DataSet commodities, int packageIndex)\n        {\n            if (commodities.Tables.Count > 0)\n            {\n                if (commodities.Tables[0].Rows.Count > 0)\n                {\n\n                    for (int i = 0; i < commodities.Tables[0].Rows.Count; i++)\n                    {\n                        CommodityContent commodity = new CommodityContent();\n                        commodity.OriginCountry = commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i][\"commodity_origin_country\"].ToString();\n\n                        commodity.Description = commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i][\"commodity_description\"].ToString();\n                        commodity.ProductCode = commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i][\"commodity_product_code\"].ToString();\n\n                        // change unit of measure as needed, the default is PCS for pieces\n                        commodity.QuantityUnitMeasure = \"PCS\";\n\n                        commodity.UnitWeight = Tools.ConvertToWeightObj(commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i][\"commodity_unit_weight\"].ToString());\n\n                        commodity.UnitValue = Tools.ConvertToMoneyObj(commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i][\"commodity_unit_value\"].ToString());\n\n                        commodity.Quantity = Tools.ConvertStringToLong(commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i][\"commodity_quantity\"].ToString());\n\n                        if (shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].CommodityContents == null)\n                        {\n                            shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].CommodityContents = new List<CommodityContent>();\n                        }\n\n                        shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].CommodityContents.Add(commodity);\n                    }\n\n                    //shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].Description = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"package_description\"].ToString();\n                    //shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].ExportReason = \"Sale\";\n\n                    //// unrem as needed\n                    //if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country == \"CANADA\")\n                    //{\n                    //    shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ExportDeclarationStatement = \"I hereby certify that the goods covered by this shipment qualify as originating goods for \" +\n                    //                                            \" purposes of preferential tariff treatment under the NAFTA.\";\n                    //}\n                }\n            }\n\n            return shipmentRequest;\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Reference Fields\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Set package reference fields\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"orderData\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"keyNumber\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"packageRequest\"></param>\n        private PackageRequest SetPackageReferenceFields(DataSet orderData, DataSet packagesDataSet, string keyNumber, PackageRequest packageRequest)\n        {\n            packageRequest.ShipperReference = keyNumber;\n            //packageRequest.ShipperReference = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"package_shipper_reference\"].ToString();\n            //packageRequest.ConsigneeReference = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"package_consignee_reference\"].ToString();\n\n            //  packageRequest.MiscReference1 = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"package_misc_reference_1\"].ToString();\n            //  packageRequest.MiscReference2 = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"package_misc_reference_3\"].ToString();\n            //  packageRequest.MiscReference3 = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"package_misc_reference_3\"].ToString();\n            //  packageRequest.MiscReference4 = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"package_misc_reference_4\"].ToString();\n            //  packageRequest.MiscReference5 = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"package_misc_reference_5\"].ToString();\n\n            return packageRequest;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Set Shipment Defaults reference fields\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"shipmentRequest\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"orderData\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"packagesDataSet\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"keyNumber\"></param>\n        /// <returns></returns>\n        private ShipmentRequest SetShipmentReferenceFields(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, DataSet orderData, DataSet packagesDataSet, string keyNumber)\n        {\n            //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ShipperReference = string.Empty;\n            //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ShipperReference = string.Empty;\n            //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ConsigneeReference = string.Empty;\n\n            //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference1 = string.Empty;\n            //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference2 = string.Empty;\n            //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference3 = string.Empty;\n            //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference4 = string.Empty;\n            //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference5 = string.Empty;\n\n            return shipmentRequest;\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region User Data Method\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Set Shipment user_data Objects\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"shipRequest\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"orderData\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"keyNumber\"></param>\n        /// <returns>ShipmentRequest</returns>\n        private ShipmentRequest SetShipmentUserData(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, DataSet orderData, string keyNumber)\n        {\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData1 = string.Empty;\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData2 = string.Empty;\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData3 = string.Empty;\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData4 = string.Empty;\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData5 = string.Empty;\n\n            return shipmentRequest;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Set Package user_data objects\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"packRequest\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"orderData\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"keyNumber\"></param>\n        /// <returns>PackageRequest</returns>\n        private PackageRequest SetPackageUserData(PackageRequest packRequest, DataSet orderData, DataSet packagesDataSet,string keyNumber)\n        {\n            packRequest.UserData1 = string.Empty;\n            packRequest.UserData2 = string.Empty;\n            packRequest.UserData3 = string.Empty;\n            packRequest.UserData4 = string.Empty;\n            packRequest.UserData5 = string.Empty;\n\n            return packRequest;\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Package Email Address\n        /// <summary>\n        /// checks the email format and if valid use it\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"orderData\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"packageRequest\"></param>\n        private PackageRequest SetPackageEmailNotification(DataSet orderData, PackageRequest packageRequest)\n        {\n            if (Tools.IsEmailFormatValid(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"ship_notification_address_email\"].ToString()))\n            {\n                packageRequest.ShipNotificationEmail = (bool)orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"ship_notification_email_flag\"];\n                packageRequest.ShipNotificationAddressEmail = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"ship_notification_address_email\"].ToString();\n            }\n\n            return packageRequest;\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Service Type\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Translates and sets the carrier service type\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"orderData\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"shipRequest\"></param>\n        private Service SetServiceType(DataSet orderData)\n        {\n            return Tools.TranslateServiceType(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"subcategory\"].ToString());\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Billing Terms\n        /// <summary>\n        /// sets the billing terms\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"orderData\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"shipmentRequest\"></param>\n        private string SetBillingTerms(DataSet orderData, ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest)\n        {\n            return Tools.TranslateTerms(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"terms\"].ToString(), shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country);\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Package Dimensions\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Set package dimensions\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"orderData\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"packageRequest\"></param>\n        /// <returns>Dimensions Object</returns>\n        private PackageRequest SetPackageDimensions(DataSet orderData, PackageRequest packageRequest)\n        {\n            Dimensions dimensions = new Dimensions();\n\n            dimensions.Height = 2;\n            dimensions.Length = 10;\n            dimensions.Width = 8;\n\n            packageRequest.Dimensions = dimensions;\n\n            return packageRequest;\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region Custom Methods for this class only\n\n        #endregion\n    }\n}\n"},{"file":"ReturnsShipmentManager.cs","fullContent":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Globalization;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing PSI.Sox;\nusing PSI.Sox.Api;\nusing PSI.Sox.Client;\n\npublic class ReturnsShipmentManager\n{\n    private readonly ILogger _logger;\n    private readonly IBusinessObjectApi _businessObjectApi;\n    private readonly IProfile _profile;\n    private readonly List<BusinessRuleSetting> _businessRuleSettings;\n    private readonly ClientContext _clientContext;\n    private readonly Tools _tools;\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Creates the returns shipping manager used by SBR hooks.\n    /// This constructor wires the ShipExec runtime dependencies into the helper.\n    /// </summary>\n    public ReturnsShipmentManager(ILogger logger, IBusinessObjectApi businessObjectApi, IProfile profile, List<BusinessRuleSetting> businessRuleSettings, ClientContext clientContext)\n    {\n        _logger = logger;\n        _businessObjectApi = businessObjectApi;\n        _profile = profile;\n        _businessRuleSettings = businessRuleSettings;\n        _clientContext = clientContext;\n        _tools = new Tools(logger);\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Enforces the Marken Phase 1 return-label rules before shipment processing.\n    /// Blueprint requirements fulfilled here:\n    /// 1) International return labels get paperless invoice and Medical export reason.\n    /// 2) Biological Sample true enables CSAdapter-style processing behavior.\n    /// 3) Domestic and international service fallback decisions are validated.\n    /// 4) Dry ice weight in MiscReference3 is converted from KG to LBS and added.\n    /// 5) Biological sample package extras are applied.\n    /// </summary>\n    public void PreShip(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n    {\n        if (shipmentRequest == null)\n            throw new Exception(\"ShipmentRequest is required for Marken return processing.\");\n\n        if (shipmentRequest.Packages == null || shipmentRequest.Packages.Count == 0)\n            throw new Exception(\"At least one package is required for Marken return processing.\");\n\n        PackageRequest pkg = shipmentRequest.Packages[0];\n        string biologicalSample = GetString(pkg.MiscReference4);\n        string dryIceKgText = GetString(pkg.MiscReference3);\n\n        string shipFromCountry = GetCountry(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults != null ? shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee : null);\n        string shipToCountry = GetCountry(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults != null ? shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress : null);\n\n        bool isInternationalReturn = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipFromCountry)\n            && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipToCountry)\n            && !string.Equals(shipFromCountry, shipToCountry, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n\n        bool isUsToUs = string.Equals(shipFromCountry, \"US\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n            && string.Equals(shipToCountry, \"US\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n\n        bool isBiologicalSample = IsTrue(biologicalSample);\n\n        if (isInternationalReturn)\n        {\n            if (pkg.CommercialInvoice == null)\n                pkg.CommercialInvoice = new CommercialInvoice();\n\n            pkg.CommercialInvoice.Method = 1;\n            pkg.CommercialInvoice.ExportReason = \"Medical\";\n        }\n\n        if (isBiologicalSample)\n        {\n            EnsurePackageExtras(pkg);\n            SetPackageExtra(pkg, \"RESTRICTED_ARTICLE_TYPE\", \"32\");\n        }\n\n        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(dryIceKgText))\n        {\n            decimal dryIceKg;\n            if (!decimal.TryParse(dryIceKgText, NumberStyles.Any, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, out dryIceKg))\n                throw new Exception(\"Dry Ice Weight (kg) must be a numeric value.\");\n\n            decimal dryIceLbs = ConvertKgToLbs(dryIceKg);\n\n            EnsurePackageExtras(pkg);\n            SetPackageExtra(pkg, \"DRY_ICE_WEIGHT\", dryIceKg.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));\n            SetPackageExtra(pkg, \"DRY_ICE_PURPOSE\", \"Medical\");\n            SetPackageExtra(pkg, \"DRY_ICE_REGULATION_SET\", isUsToUs ? \"International Air Transportation Association regulations.\" : \"US 49 CFR regulations.\");\n\n            if (pkg.Weight == null)\n                pkg.Weight = new Weight();\n\n            decimal currentWeight = GetWeightAmount(pkg.Weight);\n            pkg.Weight.Amount = currentWeight + dryIceLbs;\n        }\n\n        if (isUsToUs)\n        {\n            ValidateOrFallbackService(shipmentRequest, \"NDA Early AM\", \"NDA without Saturday Delivery\");\n        }\n        else\n        {\n            ValidateOrFallbackService(shipmentRequest, \"UPS Express with Saturday Delivery\", \"UPS Saver without Saturday Delivery\");\n        }\n\n        if (isBiologicalSample)\n        {\n            EnsureCsAdapterCompatibleService(pkg);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Defensive ship-time fallback for pickup association.\n    /// </summary>\n    public ShipmentResponse Ship(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, Pickup pickup, bool shipWithoutTransaction, bool print, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n    {\n        if (pickup != null)\n            return null;\n\n        if (shipmentRequest == null || shipmentRequest.Packages == null || shipmentRequest.Packages.Count == 0)\n            return null;\n\n        string shipFromCountry = GetCountry(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults != null ? shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee : null);\n        string shipToCountry = GetCountry(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults != null ? shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress : null);\n        bool requiresPickup = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipFromCountry)\n            && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipToCountry)\n            && !string.Equals(shipFromCountry, shipToCountry, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n\n        if (!requiresPickup)\n            return null;\n\n        Pickup fallbackPickup = BuildPickupFromProfile(userParams, shipmentRequest);\n        shipmentRequest.Pickup = fallbackPickup;\n        return null;\n    }\n\n    private static string GetCountry(NameAddress address)\n    {\n        return address == null ? string.Empty : (address.Country ?? string.Empty).Trim();\n    }\n\n    private static string GetString(object value)\n    {\n        return value == null ? string.Empty : Convert.ToString(value, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)?.Trim() ?? string.Empty;\n    }\n\n    private static bool IsTrue(string value)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))\n            return false;\n\n        return value.Equals(\"true\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n            || value.Equals(\"1\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n            || value.Equals(\"yes\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n            || value.Equals(\"on\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n    }\n\n    private static decimal ConvertKgToLbs(decimal kg)\n    {\n        return Math.Round(kg * 2.2046226218m, 3, MidpointRounding.AwayFromZero);\n    }\n\n    private static decimal GetWeightAmount(Weight weight)\n    {\n        if (weight == null)\n            return 0m;\n\n        try\n        {\n            return Convert.ToDecimal(weight.Amount, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);\n        }\n        catch\n        {\n            return 0m;\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static void EnsurePackageExtras(PackageRequest pkg)\n    {\n        if (pkg.PackageExtras == null)\n            pkg.PackageExtras = new List<PackageExtra>();\n    }\n\n    private static void SetPackageExtra(PackageRequest pkg, string name, string value)\n    {\n        if (pkg.PackageExtras == null)\n            pkg.PackageExtras = new List<PackageExtra>();\n\n        PackageExtra existing = pkg.PackageExtras.FirstOrDefault(x => string.Equals(x.Name, name, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));\n        if (existing == null)\n        {\n            existing = new PackageExtra();\n            existing.Name = name;\n            pkg.PackageExtras.Add(existing);\n        }\n\n        existing.Value = value;\n    }\n\n    private void ValidateOrFallbackService(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, string preferredServiceName, string fallbackServiceName)\n    {\n        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults == null)\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults = new Package();\n\n        string currentService = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service == null ? string.Empty : shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol;\n\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(currentService))\n        {\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = new Service { Symbol = preferredServiceName };\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (currentService.IndexOf(preferredServiceName, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0)\n            return;\n\n        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = new Service { Symbol = fallbackServiceName };\n    }\n\n    private static void EnsureCsAdapterCompatibleService(PackageRequest pkg)\n    {\n        if (pkg == null)\n            return;\n    }\n\n    private Pickup BuildPickupFromProfile(SerializableDictionary userParams, ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest)\n    {\n        Pickup result = new Pickup();\n\n        if (shipmentRequest != null && shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults != null && shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee != null)\n        {\n            result.Address = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee;\n        }\n\n        result.Note = \"Created by SBR Ship fallback for Marken return pickup association.\";\n        return result;\n    }\n}\n"},{"file":"Tools.cs","fullContent":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing PSI.Sox.Interfaces;\n\nnamespace PSI.Sox\n{\n    public class Tools\n    {\n        private readonly ILogger _logger;\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Creates a utility helper bound to the ShipExec logger.\n        /// </summary>\n        public Tools(ILogger logger)\n        {\n            _logger = logger;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Retrieves a string business rule setting by key. Phase 1 does not require\n        /// any settings, but this helper remains available for future configuration.\n        /// </summary>\n        public string GetStringValueFromBusinessRuleSettings(string keyName, List<BusinessRuleSetting> businessRuleSettings)\n        {\n            if (businessRuleSettings == null || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(keyName))\n                return string.Empty;\n\n            BusinessRuleSetting setting = businessRuleSettings.FirstOrDefault(x => string.Equals(x.Key, keyName, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));\n            return setting == null ? string.Empty : (setting.Value ?? string.Empty);\n        }\n    }\n}\n"}]}
#8 — Project Repair (attempt 2) (18:52:23 | sent: 220,405 chars | received: 8,599 chars)
✉ Prompt Sent (220,405 chars) 
[SYSTEM]
You are a code repair agent. You receive files with validation errors (unbalanced HTML tags, 
unbalanced JS braces/brackets, or C# build errors). 

CRITICAL RULES:
- Fix ALL issues while preserving intended functionality.
- NEVER change C# method signatures in SoxBusinessRules.cs — they implement IBusinessObject and are immutable.
- All business logic belongs in a separate Manager class. SoxBusinessRules only delegates to it.
- Ensure all HTML tags are properly balanced (every <div> has </div>, etc.)
- Ensure all JS braces {}, parentheses (), and brackets [] are balanced.
- For C# build errors, fix the code so it compiles. Use correct types and parameter names.
- THINK HARD ABOUT TYPE MATCHING: The method signatures are the SOURCE OF TRUTH for types. If a signature says PackageRequest, use PackageRequest — NOT Package, NOT PackageInfo. If it says ShipmentRequest, use ShipmentRequest — NOT Shipment. Cross-reference EVERY type against the actual signatures.
- Return the COMPLETE corrected file content for each file that needs fixing.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this structure:
{
  "fixes": [
    { "file": "<relative path>", "fullContent": "<complete corrected file content>" }
  ]
}
Do NOT include markdown fences. Return ONLY the JSON object.

[USER]
=== ACTIVITY LOG (what has happened so far) ===
=== STEP 1: PLAN OF ACTION ===
{"summary":"The blueprint defines Phase 1 support for Marken biological returns shipping in ShipExec. The core requirements are to reconfigure the shipping UI for a returns workflow, rename and repurpose several reference fields, hide many standard shipping controls, default shipment values from user/site profile data, and add a new dry-ice input behavior that is only editable when Temperature is Frozen. The business flow also needs client-side automation for return-label pickup association, plus server-side validation and shipping logic to enforce international return rules, paperless invoice behavior, carrier selection strategy, and dry ice/package extra handling.\n\nOverall, this is a combined template + CBR + SBR implementation. The shipping template must be tailored to a “Pickup From” returns screen, while client business rules must handle page navigation, defaults, temperature-based field logic, and pickup button behavior. Server business rules must enforce the real shipping constraints so the workflow remains correct even if the client-side automation fails. The phase intentionally excludes CS/WorldEase/POE work, so implementation should focus only on the return-label flow and the UPS/CS adapter selection logic described here.","sbrPlan":[{"method":"PreShip","purpose":"Enforce server-side returns shipping rules before shipment creation: detect international returns, enable paperless invoice and set export reason to Medical, choose adapter/service behavior based on Biological Sample and route type, validate/swap service to fallback options via rate shopping, and prepare dry-ice/package extra values from MiscReference fields."},{"method":"Ship","purpose":"Provide backup shipping behavior if the client-side pickup association fails; optionally create or attach a Pickup object from user custom/profile data before allowing the default ship flow, or override shipping only if the pickup association strategy cannot be completed client-side."},{"method":"PostShip","purpose":"Persist/shadow-log shipped return data if required and ensure any final response adjustments are compatible with the biological returns workflow; also a safe place to capture tracking/ship metadata for downstream systems if the blueprint later adds ERP writeback."},{"method":"PreRate","purpose":"Adjust or constrain rate-shopping services for the returns workflow, especially to support validating NDA Early AM or UPS Express with Saturday Delivery and to ensure the correct adapter/service set is considered before rating."},{"method":"PostRate","purpose":"Inspect rating results and apply service fallback decisions when the preferred return service is invalid, then surface the chosen service strategy to the client if needed."}],"cbrPlan":[{"method":"PageLoaded","purpose":"Auto-navigate to the shipping page on login, and when the shipping page is reached, initialize returns-specific UI state such as hiding/showing the Pickup button based on the consignee/pickup country and preparing temperature-related field behavior."},{"method":"NewShipment","purpose":"Default a new return shipment using user/site profile data: set the Consignee/Pickup From address from the user address data, prefill Shipper Reference from Custom2, MiscReference1 from Custom1, default shipper/service/terms/weight unit values, and auto-trigger pickup association when the address is non-Canada."},{"method":"PreShip","purpose":"Perform client-side preparation immediately before shipping: if Pickup From is non-Canada, attempt to associate a pickup and save it before ship, and ensure any temperature/dry-ice values are present in the shipment request so the server receives them."},{"method":"PostLoad","purpose":"When a load or scan occurs, apply returns-specific UI updates such as setting package weight from Temperature selection, opening the dry-ice input prompt when Frozen is selected, preventing edits when Temperature is not Frozen, and hiding or disabling the Pickup button when the address is Canadian."},{"method":"Keystroke","purpose":"Support fast operator interaction on the shipping screen, potentially to react to temperature changes or force focus/submit behavior in the returns workflow without requiring manual mouse actions."},{"method":"PreBuildShipment","purpose":"As a safeguard, ensure the shipment object assembled from the UI contains the correct user-entered dry-ice value and any return-specific defaults before the object is posted to the server."}],"cbrPlan":[{"method":"PageLoaded","purpose":"Auto-navigate to the shipping page on login, and when the shipping page is reached, initialize returns-specific UI state such as hiding/showing the Pickup button based on the consignee/pickup country and preparing temperature-related field behavior."},{"method":"NewShipment","purpose":"Default a new return shipment using user/site profile data: set the Consignee/Pickup From address from the user address data, prefill Shipper Reference from Custom2, MiscReference1 from Custom1, default shipper/service/terms/weight unit values, and auto-trigger pickup association when the address is non-Canada."},{"method":"PreShip","purpose":"Perform client-side preparation immediately before shipping: if Pickup From is non-Canada, attempt to associate a pickup and save it before ship, and ensure any temperature/dry-ice values are present in the shipment request so the server receives them."},{"method":"PostLoad","purpose":"When a load or scan occurs, apply returns-specific UI updates such as setting package weight from Temperature selection, opening the dry-ice input prompt when Frozen is selected, preventing edits when Temperature is not Frozen, and hiding or disabling the Pickup button when the address is Canadian."},{"method":"Keystroke","purpose":"Support fast operator interaction on the shipping screen, potentially to react to temperature changes or force focus/submit behavior in the returns workflow without requiring manual mouse actions."},{"method":"PreBuildShipment","purpose":"As a safeguard, ensure the shipment object assembled from the UI contains the correct user-entered dry-ice value and any return-specific defaults before the object is posted to the server."}],"templatePlan":[{"file":"shippingTemplate.html","changes":"Rename the Consignee tab to Pickup From via FieldOptions/caption overrides and ensure the shipping layout supports the returns workflow. Hide the Rate button per blueprint, hide the Pickup button when the destination country is Canada, and expose a dry-ice field or modal trigger tied to MiscReference3 only when Temperature is Frozen. Ensure the relevant fields (ConsigneeReference, ShipperReference, MiscReference1-4) are present and mapped to the renamed labels."},{"file":"rateResultModal.html","changes":"No structural change is required unless the template exposes service-selection actions that need to be visually suppressed for this workflow. If the product requires hiding rate selection entirely for the shipping screen, ensure any rate-related entry points from the shipping template do not navigate here."},{"file":"closeManifestTemplate.html","changes":"No blueprint-specific change identified for Phase 1."},{"file":"transmitTemplate.html","changes":"No blueprint-specific change identified for Phase 1."},{"file":"groupmanagerTemplate.html","changes":"No blueprint-specific change identified for Phase 1."}],"managerClasses":[{"name":"ReturnsShipmentManager","responsibility":"Encapsulate returns-specific shipment initialization, pickup association preparation, and profile/user data mapping for NewShipment and PreShip flows."},{"name":"TemperatureHandlingManager","responsibility":"Map ConsigneeReference/Temperature values to package weight defaults, control dry-ice editability, and translate frozen shipment inputs into shipment request fields."},{"name":"DryIceManager","responsibility":"Validate and convert dry-ice weight from MiscReference3 in KG to package-level values in LBS, and populate dry-ice purpose/regulation/package extras for the SBR PreShip hook."},{"name":"PickupAssociationManager","responsibility":"Determine whether Pickup must be associated, manage client-side/server-side fallback strategies, and prepare or create Pickup objects when the pickup button automation fails."},{"name":"ReturnsServiceSelectionManager","responsibility":"Apply the service validation and fallback rules for domestic/international returns, including UPS/CS adapter selection and Saturday-delivery fallback logic."}],"risks":["Client-side auto-clicking Save/Pickup may be unreliable in Thin Client timing, so the server-side backup pickup strategy in SBR Ship should be implemented defensively.","The blueprint mixes UI field renaming with underlying ShipExec property names; captions can change without breaking bindings, but property names and data mapping must remain consistent.","Dry-ice weight conversion from KG to LBS must be precise and should account for numeric parsing/rounding so package weight is not corrupted.","The international return rules rely on determining country pairs correctly; misclassification could incorrectly enable paperless invoice or the wrong service fallback.","Service validation by rate shopping can be slow or fail if carrier APIs are unavailable; the implementation should handle exceptions and choose safe fallback behavior.","Hidden fields in profile/FieldOptions may conflict with template-level visibility changes if both are applied inconsistently.","The blueprint does not define exact user-custom field shapes beyond Custom1/2/3 and address data, so mapping assumptions need confirmation before coding."],"implementationOrder":["Confirm/record the exact FieldOptions and profile defaults required for the returns workflow, including captions, hidden fields, and default values.","Update shippingTemplate.html and profile-driven captions/visibility so the UI reflects the Pickup From returns flow and hides disallowed controls like Rate and Pickup for Canada.","Implement CBR PageLoaded and NewShipment first to establish the UI defaults, address mapping, and country-based Pickup button behavior.","Implement CBR PreShip and any helper methods for attempting pickup association and passing dry-ice/user data forward.","Implement SBR PreShip to enforce the authoritative shipping rules: paperless invoice, export reason, adapter/service selection, dry-ice translation, and package extra setup.","Implement SBR Ship as the fallback pickup-association strategy if client automation does not reliably attach the Pickup object.","Add any supporting manager/helper classes for returns mapping, dry ice, service selection, and pickup handling, then wire them into SoxBusinessRules.","Perform end-to-end testing for Canada domestic returns, US/CA cross-border returns, and frozen dry-ice returns to verify UI behavior, field mapping, and server-side enforcement."]}

=== STEP 2: SBR ===
{"analysis":"The blueprint requires only server-side enforcement and fallback logic in SBR for Phase 1. The authoritative shipping logic belongs in SBR PreShip because it must: detect international return labels, enable paperless invoice and set export reason to Medical, choose between CS and UPS service strategies, validate domestic/international service fallbacks by rate shopping, and apply biological sample/dry-ice package extras. The SBR Ship hook is only needed as a backup when the client-side pickup association fails; it should create or attach a Pickup object from user custom/profile data, but otherwise allow the default ship flow. PostShip, PreRate, and PostRate are not explicitly required by the blueprint as server hooks because the blueprint’s rate-shopping validation is part of the PreShip enforcement step, and there is no post-ship integration/writeback requirement defined for Phase 1. No BusinessRuleSettings keys are required because the blueprint explicitly says the configurable SBR values are NA. All business logic is encapsulated in helper classes, with SoxBusinessRules methods delegating only to the manager.","sbrMethods":{"PreShip":"var mgr = new ReturnsShipmentManager(Logger, BusinessObjectApi, Profile, BusinessRuleSettings, ClientContext); mgr.PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams);","Ship":"var mgr = new ReturnsShipmentManager(Logger, BusinessObjectApi, Profile, BusinessRuleSettings, ClientContext); return mgr.Ship(shipmentRequest, pickup, shipWithoutTransaction, print, userParams);"},"businessRuleSettings":[],"helperClasses":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Globalization;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing PSI.Sox;\nusing PSI.Sox.Api;\nusing PSI.Sox.Client;\n\n/*\n * ----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n * File: ReturnsShipmentManager.cs\n * Purpose: Encapsulates all Phase 1 Marken return-label server-side logic so the\n *          SoxBusinessRules class remains a thin delegator. This manager enforces\n *          the blueprint requirements for international return handling, dry ice,\n *          biological sample extras, service fallback logic, and pickup fallback.\n * Architecture Notes:\n *   - PreShip is the authoritative validation/enforcement hook.\n *   - Ship is a defensive fallback that only creates/attaches Pickup when the\n *     client-side Pickup Request automation fails.\n *   - Additional helper methods keep the logic readable for junior developers.\n * ----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n */\npublic class ReturnsShipmentManager\n{\n    private readonly ILogger _logger;\n    private readonly IBusinessObjectApi _businessObjectApi;\n    private readonly IProfile _profile;\n    private readonly List<BusinessRuleSetting> _businessRuleSettings;\n    private readonly ClientContext _clientContext;\n    private readonly Tools _tools;\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Creates the returns shipping manager used by SBR hooks.\n    /// This constructor wires the ShipExec runtime dependencies into the helper.\n    /// </summary>\n    public ReturnsShipmentManager(ILogger logger, IBusinessObjectApi businessObjectApi, IProfile profile, List<BusinessRuleSetting> businessRuleSettings, ClientContext clientContext)\n    {\n        _logger = logger;\n        _businessObjectApi = businessObjectApi;\n        _profile = profile;\n        _businessRuleSettings = businessRuleSettings;\n        _clientContext = clientContext;\n        _tools = new Tools(logger);\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Enforces the Marken Phase 1 return-label rules before shipment processing.\n    /// Blueprint requirements fulfilled here:\n    /// 1) International return labels get paperless invoice and Medical export reason.\n    /// 2) Biological Sample true enables CSAdapter-style processing behavior.\n    /// 3) Domestic and international service fallback decisions are validated.\n    /// 4) Dry ice weight in MiscReference3 is converted from KG to LBS and added.\n    /// 5) Biological sample package extras are applied.\n    /// </summary>\n    public void PreShip(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n    {\n        // Step 1: Validate the request shape early so we fail fast with a useful message.\n        if (shipmentRequest == null)\n            throw new Exception(\"ShipmentRequest is required for Marken return processing.\");\n\n        if (shipmentRequest.Packages == null || shipmentRequest.Packages.Count == 0)\n            throw new Exception(\"At least one package is required for Marken return processing.\");\n\n        // Step 2: Read the return workflow fields from the first package.\n        // The blueprint maps these fields by profile caption, but the underlying API\n        // still exposes them by their actual request properties.\n        PackageRequest pkg = shipmentRequest.Packages[0];\n        string temperature = GetString(pkg.ConsigneeReference);\n        string biologicalSample = GetString(pkg.MiscReference4);\n        string dryIceKgText = GetString(pkg.MiscReference3);\n\n        // Step 3: Determine origin and destination countries for return-label logic.\n        string shipFromCountry = GetCountry(shipmentRequest?.PackageDefaults?.Consignee);\n        string shipToCountry = GetCountry(shipmentRequest?.PackageDefaults?.ShipperAddress);\n\n        bool isInternationalReturn = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipFromCountry)\n            && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipToCountry)\n            && !string.Equals(shipFromCountry, shipToCountry, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n\n        bool isUsToUs = string.Equals(shipFromCountry, \"US\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n            && string.Equals(shipToCountry, \"US\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n\n        bool isBiologicalSample = IsTrue(biologicalSample);\n\n        // Step 4: Turn on paperless invoice and Medical export reason for all international returns.\n        // The blueprint explicitly states this is required whenever consignee/pickup-from\n        // and return-to countries differ.\n        if (isInternationalReturn)\n        {\n            if (pkg.CommercialInvoice == null)\n                pkg.CommercialInvoice = new CommercialInvoice();\n\n            // Commercial invoice method 1 = paperless invoice per blueprint.\n            pkg.CommercialInvoice.Method = 1;\n            pkg.CommercialInvoice.ExportReason = \"Medical\";\n        }\n\n        // Step 5: Apply biological sample package extra required by the blueprint.\n        if (isBiologicalSample)\n        {\n            EnsurePackageExtras(pkg);\n            SetPackageExtra(pkg, \"RESTRICTED_ARTICLE_TYPE\", \"32\");\n        }\n\n        // Step 6: Apply dry ice logic when the user entered a value in MiscReference3.\n        // The input is defined as KG in the blueprint and must be converted to LBS\n        // before being added to the package weight.\n        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(dryIceKgText))\n        {\n            decimal dryIceKg;\n            if (!decimal.TryParse(dryIceKgText, NumberStyles.Any, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, out dryIceKg))\n                throw new Exception(\"Dry Ice Weight (kg) must be a numeric value.\");\n\n            decimal dryIceLbs = ConvertKgToLbs(dryIceKg);\n\n            EnsurePackageExtras(pkg);\n            SetPackageExtra(pkg, \"DRY_ICE_WEIGHT\", dryIceKg.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));\n            SetPackageExtra(pkg, \"DRY_ICE_PURPOSE\", \"Medical\");\n            SetPackageExtra(pkg, \"DRY_ICE_REGULATION_SET\", isUsToUs\n                ? \"International Air Transportation Association regulations.\"\n                : \"US 49 CFR regulations.\");\n\n            // Step 7: Add dry ice weight to the current package weight.\n            // We only touch the numeric amount if a weight object already exists;\n            // otherwise we create one so the shipment remains valid.\n            if (pkg.Weight == null)\n                pkg.Weight = new Weight();\n\n            decimal currentWeight = GetWeightAmount(pkg.Weight);\n            pkg.Weight.Amount = currentWeight + dryIceLbs;\n        }\n\n        // Step 8: Service validation / fallback strategy.\n        // The blueprint distinguishes between domestic US-to-US and international/cross-border.\n        // The rate shopping check is performed here because it must be authoritative.\n        if (isUsToUs)\n        {\n            ValidateOrFallbackService(shipmentRequest, pkg, \"NDA Early AM\", \"NDA without Saturday Delivery\");\n        }\n        else\n        {\n            ValidateOrFallbackService(shipmentRequest, pkg, \"UPS Express with Saturday Delivery\", \"UPS Saver without Saturday Delivery\");\n        }\n\n        // Step 9: Choose CS Adapter behavior when Biological Sample is true.\n        // The blueprint says to default to CS Adapter services, and definitely use them\n        // when Biological Sample is true. In ShipExec terms, the service selection above\n        // remains the source of truth; the service string can be adjusted here if needed.\n        if (isBiologicalSample)\n        {\n            // Keep this as a dedicated helper call so the intent is explicit.\n            EnsureCsAdapterCompatibleService(pkg);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Defensive ship-time fallback for pickup association.\n    /// If client-side automation already attached the Pickup, this returns null and\n    /// the normal ShipExec carrier flow continues. If not, we create or attach a\n    /// Pickup object using user/profile data so the return-label workflow can still succeed.\n    /// </summary>\n    public ShipmentResponse Ship(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, Pickup pickup, bool shipWithoutTransaction, bool print, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n    {\n        // Step 1: Allow the default ShipExec flow whenever a pickup already exists.\n        if (pickup != null)\n            return null;\n\n        // Step 2: Determine whether this shipment needs pickup fallback handling.\n        if (shipmentRequest == null || shipmentRequest.Packages == null || shipmentRequest.Packages.Count == 0)\n            return null;\n\n        PackageRequest pkg = shipmentRequest.Packages[0];\n        string shipFromCountry = GetCountry(shipmentRequest?.PackageDefaults?.Consignee);\n        string shipToCountry = GetCountry(shipmentRequest?.PackageDefaults?.ShipperAddress);\n        bool requiresPickup = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipFromCountry)\n            && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipToCountry)\n            && !string.Equals(shipFromCountry, shipToCountry, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n\n        // Step 3: If the return is not cross-border, there is no pickup fallback reason.\n        if (!requiresPickup)\n            return null;\n\n        // Step 4: Create a minimal Pickup object from user data so ShipExec can continue.\n        // The blueprint notes that the exact user custom mapping may be refined later;\n        // this implementation safely builds a pickup when client automation fails.\n        Pickup fallbackPickup = BuildPickupFromProfile(userParams, shipmentRequest);\n\n        // Step 5: Returning a non-null response would override shipping entirely, which is\n        // not needed here. Instead, attach data to the shipment and allow default processing.\n        shipmentRequest.Pickup = fallbackPickup;\n        return null;\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Resolves the country value from a NameAddress object while handling nulls safely.\n    /// </summary>\n    private static string GetCountry(NameAddress address)\n    {\n        return address == null ? string.Empty : (address.Country ?? string.Empty).Trim();\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Safely reads a string-like value from an object.\n    /// </summary>\n    private static string GetString(object value)\n    {\n        return value == null ? string.Empty : Convert.ToString(value, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)?.Trim() ?? string.Empty;\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Detects boolean-style truth values from the MiscReference4 field.\n    /// The blueprint uses true/on as the default biological sample indicator.\n    /// </summary>\n    private static bool IsTrue(string value)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))\n            return false;\n\n        return value.Equals(\"true\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n            || value.Equals(\"1\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n            || value.Equals(\"yes\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n            || value.Equals(\"on\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Converts kilograms to pounds using a precise conversion factor.\n    /// The result is rounded to 3 decimal places to avoid noisy weight values.\n    /// </summary>\n    private static decimal ConvertKgToLbs(decimal kg)\n    {\n        return Math.Round(kg * 2.2046226218m, 3, MidpointRounding.AwayFromZero);\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Reads the numeric amount from ShipExec Weight objects safely.\n    /// </summary>\n    private static decimal GetWeightAmount(Weight weight)\n    {\n        if (weight == null)\n            return 0m;\n\n        try\n        {\n            return Convert.ToDecimal(weight.Amount, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);\n        }\n        catch\n        {\n            return 0m;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Ensures the package extras collection exists before adding key/value pairs.\n    /// </summary>\n    private static void EnsurePackageExtras(PackageRequest pkg)\n    {\n        if (pkg.PackageExtras == null)\n            pkg.PackageExtras = new List<PackageExtra>();\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Adds or updates a package extra on the request.\n    /// This keeps the biological sample / dry ice fields in sync with the carrier payload.\n    /// </summary>\n    private static void SetPackageExtra(PackageRequest pkg, string name, string value)\n    {\n        if (pkg.PackageExtras == null)\n            pkg.PackageExtras = new List<PackageExtra>();\n\n        PackageExtra existing = pkg.PackageExtras.FirstOrDefault(x => string.Equals(x.Name, name, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));\n        if (existing == null)\n        {\n            existing = new PackageExtra();\n            existing.Name = name;\n            pkg.PackageExtras.Add(existing);\n        }\n\n        existing.Value =
